narrative:
Fairfield Twp 13 (precinct in Butler County) has 453 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
